title: Borås, Västra Götaland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Borås, Västra Götaland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Borås is a city in Västra Götaland with a population of 113,000. A textile and logistics hub in western Sweden, known for its zoo, recycling industry, and football culture.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
